title: pyrus pyraster subsp. achras
intro: Pyrus pyraster subsp. achras is a subspecies of pear tree, specifically known as the Wild Pear or European Pear. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The fruit and leaves of the Pyrus pyraster subsp. achras plant are used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, providing benefits such as improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and boosted immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and teas, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
